announcements.title: ACE CAREERS | TALENT HUB
announcements.message: ACE Careers Talent Hub connects graduates with opportunities across business, technology, healthcare and engineering sectors.

jobs.title: Marketing Executive (MBA Marketing)
jobs.location: Plan marketing campaigns, support brand promotion and generate leads.

jobs.title: Business Development Executive (MBA Marketing)
jobs.location: Identify new clients, generate leads and expand business opportunities.

jobs.title: Financial Analyst (MBA Finance)
jobs.location: Analyze financial data, prepare reports and support financial planning.

jobs.title: Relationship Manager (MBA Finance)
jobs.location: Manage banking clients and promote financial products and services.

jobs.title: HR Generalist (MBA HR)
jobs.location: Handle recruitment, onboarding and HR operations.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Executive (MBA HR)
jobs.location: Source candidates and coordinate hiring processes.

jobs.title: International Sales Executive (MBA IB)
jobs.location: Manage international clients and export sales operations.

jobs.title: Export Documentation Executive (MBA IB)
jobs.location: Prepare export documentation and coordinate shipping processes.

jobs.title: Business Analyst (MBA Systems)
jobs.location: Analyze business requirements and support technology solutions.

jobs.title: Systems Administrator (MBA Systems / BTech IT)
jobs.location: Manage servers, network infrastructure and IT systems.

jobs.title: Management Trainee (BBA)
jobs.location: Assist managers and learn core business operations.

jobs.title: Sales Executive (BBA)
jobs.location: Promote products, manage customers and achieve sales targets.

jobs.title: Data Analyst (BSc AI / Computer Science)
jobs.location: Analyze data sets and generate insights for business decisions.

jobs.title: IT Helpdesk Technician (BSc Computer Applications)
jobs.location: Provide technical support and troubleshoot IT issues.

jobs.title: MIS Executive (BCom Computer Applications)
jobs.location: Prepare management reports and maintain business data systems.

jobs.title: Accounts Executive (BCom Finance)
jobs.location: Maintain financial records and manage accounting transactions.

jobs.title: Tax Consultant (MCom)
jobs.location: Assist with tax filing, GST compliance and financial reporting.

jobs.title: Medical Representative (BSc / BPharm)
jobs.location: Promote pharmaceutical products to doctors and healthcare providers.

jobs.title: Staff Nurse (BSc Nursing / GNM)
jobs.location: Provide patient care and assist doctors in hospital departments.

jobs.title: Medical Lab Technician (Allied Health Sciences)
jobs.location: Perform laboratory tests and assist diagnostic services.
